title: Senior Software Engineer - Hexaware Technologies Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Hexaware Technologies Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
